name: adlc-design
description: Cross-cutting design domain, loaded only when the work touches Figma or a design surface (Figma is the only supported design tool for now): on-demand Figma skills (design-context extraction, design-token mapping + precise Code Connect mappings to the design system, DS/style/font reuse, live-design drift detection, pixel-fidelity verification), the design-token pipeline (DTCG -> Style Dictionary -> web/iOS/Android), UI craft + anti-generic doctrine, UX flows + usability heuristics, accessibility, and the design-critic agent. Cite from any UI domain pack.
